form.formComment: Returns from a 32-day let-up. Last start won by 1.75 len at Doomben Cl4 March 11 over 1110m on a rain affected track defeating Star Rapper carrying 56kg at $3.40. Before that made ground from midfield; 2nd of 7 at Eagle Farm Bm78 on February 14 over 1000m, on a slow track; 2.75 len behind Moonhaven carrying 57.5kg at $10. Ideally placed to make it two on the trot.

form.formComment: Half-brother to Group 3 winner Heuristic. Last start struggled in the run home; second last of 8 at this track Cl5 on March 29 over 1000m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Chalice Well with 57kg at $5. The start before that won by 1.75 len at this track Cl3 February 22 over 1000m on a rain affected track defeating Bruckheimer with 58kg at $7. Rates highly on best figures and can turn things around.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after seven months 4th of 10 at Ipswich Bm65 on March 26 over 800m, 2 len behind Exceloquent with 61kg at $4.40. Previously second-up 3rd of 9 at Ipswich 3yo Bm68 on July 9 over 1100m, slow going long-neck behind Paleface Ringo carrying 56.5kg at $18. Anticipating a big run.

form.formComment: Last start favourite; won by a nose at Eagle Farm F&M Bm65 March 25 over 1200m defeating Esprit Du Jour with 59.5kg at $3.80. Before that favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; scored a big 4 len win at this track Cl2 March 13 over 1100m in heavy going defeating A Touch From Fayt carrying 55.5kg at $12. Happy to risk this time.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after 10 months 4th of 8 at Eagle Farm Bm68 on March 25 over 1000m, 1.75 len behind Impact Zone carrying 58kg at $8. Previously second-up scored a big 6 len win at this track F&M Cl1 February 23 2025 over 1200m in soft going defeating Glowlight carrying 58.5kg at $2.80. form.formComment: Full-sister to Group 1 winner Jonker. Returns from a 49-day let-up. Most recently tracked the speed and boxed on steadily second last of 7 at this track Cl3 on February 22 over 1000m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Admitted with 53kg at $4.80. The run before that held ground to the line 2nd of 13 at Rockhampton Bm60 on February 5 over 1200m, slow going 0.5 len behind Amberinger with 58kg at $3.60. Disappointing latest but looks a place hope.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of six-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign second of 7 at Mackay 3&4yo Bm65 September 27 over 1800m, 4 len behind Better Be Ready carrying 60kg at $4. Previously first up; second of 7 at Townsville 3yo Hcp June 12 over 1000m, a long neck behind Hand Grenade carrying 54.5kg at $6.50. Might need this hit-out.
